notes: Run 2026-06-24. Mechanics: Homophones & Soundalikes (5) + Hidden Words (5). Last pack (2026-06-23) used Anagrams + Hidden Words; choosing Homophones + Hidden Words to rotate. Homophone answers (Hour, Mown, Great, Prophet, Muscle) and hidden-word carriers prowl (Owl), newer (Ewe), mode (Ode), return (Urn), paradox (Ox) are all fresh — none appear in the active bank or prior drafts. Each sentence evokes the answer's meaning, not just the hidden letters or soundalike.

questions.constraint_text: This word sounds exactly like another word with a different spelling and meaning.
questions.clue: We all agreed the riverside park was our shared green space and spent sixty minutes planting new saplings along the bank before the evening bell.
